taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Java Full Stack Development, REST API Development, Microservices Architecture, API Design, Service-to-Service Authentication
skill_match_scores: Java Full Stack Development:1.0, REST API Development:1.0, Microservices Architecture:1.0, API Design:1.0, Service-to-Service Authentication:0.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of experience in software, systems, or embedded engineering, 3+ years of experience working Java Full Stack, 3+ years of experience creating REST APIs, Proven delivery of microservices (REST/async messaging), API design, and service-to-service auth, Strong hands-on experience with Kubernetes, containerization, and GitOps (e.g., ArgoCD/Flux) operating production systems, Understanding of network protocols, security best practices, and scalable API design, Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and modern DevOps practices, Bachelor's degree, preferably in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related IT discipline; or equivalent experience, Limited immigration sponsorship may be available, Ability to travel 10%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve
preferred_quals: Proven ability to communicate complex technical concepts clearly and effectively, Analytical ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize tasks into manageable work products, Can operate independently or with minimum supervision, Excellent Written and Communication Skills, Ability to deliver technical demonstrations
core_responsibilities: Rationalize PCS service providers into a select set of strategic partners across Engineering and Cloud Security Services, Drive measurable value through cost optimization, improved productivity, enhanced customer experience, and simplified operations, Ensure delivery excellence with a focus on quality, speed, and innovation, Design and build full-stack features: React UI + Java/Spring Boot (and/or Python) backend services with clean APIs and robust error handling, Own microservice architecture concerns: service boundaries, contracts, versioning, backwards compatibility, and resilience patterns, Implement and maintain CI/CD and GitOps workflows; improve developer productivity and deployment reliability, Deliver experimentation capabilities: integrate feature flags, run A/B tests, analyze outcomes, and iterate safely, Engineer for scale: address consistency issues, race conditions, concurrency controls, and distributed transaction alternatives (sagas/outbox), Communicate regularly with Engagement Managers (Directors), project team members, and representatives from various functional and / or technical teams, including escalating any matters that require additional attention and consideration from engagement management, Independently and collaboratively lead client engagement workstreams focused on improvement, optimization, and transformation of processes including implementing leading practice workflows, addressing deficits in quality, and driving operational outcomes
job_summary: Deloitte is a leading consulting firm seeking an experienced Java Full Stack Developer - Project Delivery Senior Analyst. The role involves designing and building full-stack features, ensuring delivery excellence, and leading client engagement workstreams focused on process improvement and operational outcomes.
